title: denial_reason_result.json -- insurer's stated position, extracted and classified v0.1
description: Extracts denial/reduction/non-payment reasons from an insurer-response document and classifies each against the R-code taxonomy. Produced by denial-response, which is dependency-triggered (runs whenever a flagged insurer-response document's processed text exists) rather than phase-gated -- see pipeline.md. Judgment-type output; include the safety fields (source_grounded etc.) from common_component_output.schema.json.

denial_reasons.description: Extracted reasons. Empty array means no denial/reduction found.

reason_type.description: denial=non-payment, reduction=reduced payout, partial_payment=partial payout, document_request=additional documents requested

taxonomy_label.description: R-code display label, in Korean. e.g. 기왕증 / 기존 질환 기여도

candidate_codes.description: Top-3 candidate R-codes (descending confidence, first entry matches taxonomy_code). Used for the denial-reason Top-3 agreement metric.

insurer_claim_summary.description: Summary of the insurer's position. Use hedged, non-definitive phrasing (see the forbidden-expression guide in pipeline.md).

reduction_rate.description: Reduction rate. null if not applicable.

reduction_amount.description: Reduction amount (KRW). null if not stated in the source.
